summary: Server Actions and form handlers that receive `FormData` must validate the input against a schema (Zod `.safeParse(...)` is the canonical pattern) before reading values. Unvalidated `formData.get('name')` flows are the most common Server Action footgun in Next 15+. This recipe maps to plugin rule `rules-as-tests/require-form-safe-parse` (R14).
bestPractices: Define a Zod schema for every Server Action that accepts `FormData`.
Surface validation errors back to the form via the action's return type — do not swallow.
antiPatterns: Trusting client-supplied form fields as already validated.
Validating on the client only (server is the trust boundary in Server Actions).
